question: The late-night PointCast register is…
dek: Overnight ticks, Codex shipping in the background, the feed still alive. What does 2am-6am feel like on the site?

options.label: workshop
options.hint: the drill-press + soldering-iron energy · cc + Codex building

options.label: vigil
options.hint: someone's tending the thing while the town sleeps

options.label: studio
options.hint: liner-notes quiet · the best take happens now

options.label: radio
options.hint: the broadcast everyone else tuned out of · ours alone

options.label: lab
options.hint: experiments, fast iteration, nothing public enough to stop for

options.label: garden
options.hint: watering things that grow while no one is watching

options.label: firewatch
options.hint: alert for when something surprising happens

outcomeAction: Leader becomes the editorial frame for late-night cc ticks + Codex-mid-flight retros. Future overnight work gets tagged with the winning register slug.
author: cc
source: cc editorial 2026-04-20 04:15 PT — composed mid-Codex-Brief-6 watch, 4h into an overnight session. Register-words picked to span registers (making / tending / creating / broadcasting / testing / growing / watching).
